features: „ÄêReliable Paper Bags„ÄëOur 50pcs paper bag set includes 50 paper bags with handles. Each brown paper bag measures 21x11x27cm. It can be used as a snack bag, gift bag, party bag, or for gift wrapping.

„ÄêReliable & Durable Material„ÄëOur kraft paper bags are made from 130g kraft paper, making them sturdy, tear-resistant, and highly eco-friendly as they are recyclable. The handles and bottom at kraft paper bags are securely bonded with strong adhesive, providing excellent load-bearing capacity and allowing for repeated use.

„ÄêPersonalized DIY„ÄëFeaturing a plain brown design, our kraft paper bags are perfect for creative crafts. You can unleash your imagination by doodling, adding stickers, or other decorations to create unique brown carrier bags. If you prefer not to DIY, the simple brown appearance also offers an elegant and stylish ready to use option.

„ÄêAmple Quantity & Wide Applications„ÄëWith 50 pieces included, there are enough bags for various occasions such as parties, weddings, anniversaries, and birthdays. The size is ideal for packaging Christmas gifts, fruits, snacks, and other small items, and the kraft paper bags are also great for everyday shopping, Christmas, Halloween, and New Year celebrations.

„ÄêComprehensive After-Sales Service„ÄëOur kraft paper bags measure 21x11x27cm (8.27x4.33x10.63 inches). Please confirm the size meets your needs before purchasing. If you encounter any issues during your purchase, feel free to contact us, and we will assist you within 24 hours.
